_comment: Passive profiling for Codex CLI (mirror of .claude/settings.json). Hot path uses native hook_record_fast(.exe); rebuild it from hook_record_fast.c if missing. Pre+PostToolUse record start/result so `status` derives each command's duration_ms (the native hot path keeps overhead ~1-2ms/call); successful read-only plumbing/search commands are skipped. Records append per-session to tmp/session_profiles/sessions/ for `node tools/ai.mjs status`. If hooks do not fire, ensure `[features] hooks = true` in .codex/config.toml (hooks are enabled by default in current Codex).
